summary_en: 500,000 shares (0.74% of S/O) to be acquired for maximum ¥1.0 billion via ToSTNeT-3 open-market purchases from May 15 to September 30, 2026. Rationale: capital efficiency and shareholder return enhancement. Board chairman Maeda Masatoshi intends to sell shares; related-party safeguards applied.
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Shares (Acquisition of Treasury Shares Based on Articles of Incorporation Pursuant to Article 165(2) of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: Maeda Kosen announced on May 14, 2026 that its board has authorized the acquisition of up to 500,000 common shares (0.74% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum of ¥1.0 billion. The company will execute purchases via ToSTNeT-3 (Tokyo Stock Exchange open-market off-hours trading) between May 15 and September 30, 2026. The stated purpose is to enhance capital efficiency and expand shareholder returns. Board chairman Maeda Masatoshi has communicated his intention to sell shares held by him. To mitigate conflict of interest, Maeda Masatoshi and CEO Maeda Naohiro (his son) did not participate in the board resolution, as both qualify as related parties to the transaction.
